x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: VA catalog integration enables Now Assist to guide employees through service requests within conversations. Without catalog integration, AI cannot complete fulfillment.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_cs_topic");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.addQuery("published",true);gr.addEncodedQuery("descriptionLIKEcatalog^ORdescriptionLIKErequest");gr.query();var catTopics=gr.getRowCount();return{status:catTopics>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:catTopics+" catalog-connected VA topics",finding:catTopics<10?"Only "+catTopics+" catalog-connected VA topics. Now Assist AI-guided fulfillment requires catalog integration for service request completion.":catTopics+" catalog-connected topics -- Now Assist can guide employees through AI-assisted service fulfillment."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Connect VA topics to catalog items via Catalog task topic blocks. Test end-to-end catalog fulfillment in VA.
